- [ ] Code style (formatting, renaming)

## Testing

Describe how you verified your changes. Include commands run and any relevant test configuration.

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines (ESLint, Prettier)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have added unit tests for new or changed behavior
- [ ] I have updated Pact contracts if I changed API interfaces
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
